message: Bump GitHub Actions and Node.js to latest versions

files.patch:
@@ -13,12 +13,12 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Setup Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
-          node-version: "20"
+          node-version: "24"
           cache: "npm"
 
       - name: Install dependencies
@@ -32,12 +32,12 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Setup Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
-          node-version: "20"
+          node-version: "24"
           cache: "npm"
 
       - name: Install dependencies

@@ -16,10 +16,10 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@v6
 
       - name: Setup Node.js
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: "24"
           registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"
